content: On-prem ops pitfalls: backups untested until emergency (quarterly restore drills recommended); Flyway has no automatic down-migrations — rollback scripts are not a substitute for backup/restore, DDL non-transactional on some DBs; fix-forward is default strategy; secrets leak via repo/logs/customer-visible configs; migration rollback should be drilled in CI against production-like data. Sources: Redgate Flyway docs/articles, Harness, dev.to.
